global.title: RelationalDbProcessor extends IProcessor to project document operations into SQL tables with type-safe migrations and namespaced databases per drive
global.content: Generate with `ph generate --processor <name> --processor-type relationalDb --document-types <type>`. Creates: processor class (extends `RelationalDbProcessor<DB>`), migrations.ts (up/down functions with Kysely-style schema builder), factory.ts (creates namespaced DB per drive), schema.ts (generated TypeScript types from migration via `ph generate --migration-file`). The processor lifecycle: `initAndUpgrade()` runs migrations on startup, `onOperations()` handles each batch, `onDisconnect()` cleans up. Namespaces (`getNamespace(driveId)`) prevent data collisions between drives. Data is exposed through subgraphs via `TodoIndexerProcessor.query(driveId, relationalDb)` for type-safe SQL queries.
global.description: Generated with --processor-type relationalDb; uses migrations for schema, namespaces to isolate per-drive data.
